firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. The Name Is Truth. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying, Beyond Birth, Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace ~

firstLine: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੋਵਨਿ ਆਕਾਰ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਕਹਿਆ ਜਾਈ ॥
translationEn: By His Command, bodies are created; His Command cannot be described.
Some sing that He watches over us, face to face, ever-present.

firstLine: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਨਾਇ ਭਾਖਿਆ ਭਾਉ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
translationEn: True is the Master, True is His Name-speak it with infinite love.

firstLine: ਥਾਪਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਕੀਤਾ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
translationEn: He cannot be established, He cannot be created.

firstLine: ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਵਾ ਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਣੇ ਕਿ ਨਾਇ ਕਰੀ ॥
translationEn: If I am pleasing to Him, then that is my pilgrimage and cleansing bath. Without pleasing Him, what good are ritual cleansings?

firstLine: ਜੇ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਆਰਜਾ ਹੋਰ ਦਸੂਣੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
translationEn: Even if you could live throughout the four ages, or even ten times more,
Listening-the Siddhas, the spiritual teachers, the heroic warriors, the yogic masters.
Listening-dive deep into the ocean of virtue.

firstLine: ਮੰਨੇ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
translationEn: The state of the faithful cannot be described.
The faithful have intuitive awareness and intelligence.
The path of the faithful shall never be blocked.
The faithful find the Door of Liberation.
The chosen ones, the self-elect, are accepted and approved.
When the hands and the feet and the body are dirty,
Pilgrimages, austere discipline, compassion and charity
There are nether worlds beneath nether worlds, and hundreds of thousands of heavenly worlds above.

firstLine: ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਏਤੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਆ ॥
translationEn: The praisers praise the Lord, but they do not obtain intuitive understanding

firstLine: ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਕਹਣਿ ਨ ਅੰਤੁ ॥
translationEn: Endless are His Praises, endless are those who speak them.
His Blessings are so abundant that there can be no written account of them.

firstLine: ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਬਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
translationEn: Where is that Gate, and where is that Dwelling, in which You sit and take care of all?

firstLine: ਮੁੰਦਾ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਸਰਮੁ ਪਤੁ ਝੋਲੀ ਧਿਆਨ ਕੀ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਿਭੂਤਿ ॥
translationEn: Make contentment your ear-rings, humility your begging bowl, and meditation the ashes you apply to your body.
I bow to Him, I humbly bow.

firstLine: ਏਕਾ ਮਾਈ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਵਿਆਈ ਤਿਨਿ ਚੇਲੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
translationEn: The One Divine Mother conceived and gave birth to the three deities.
On world after world are His Seats of Authority and His Storehouses.

firstLine: ਇਕ ਦੂ ਜੀਭੌ ਲਖ ਹੋਹਿ ਲਖ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਲਖ ਵੀਸ ॥
translationEn: If I had 100,000 tongues, and these were then multiplied twenty times more, with each tongue,
No power to speak, no power to keep silent.
This is righteous living in the realm of Dharma.
In the realm of humility, the Word is Beauty.
In the realm of karma, the Word is Power.
Let self-control be the furnace, and patience the goldsmith.
So Dar ~ That Door. Raag Aasaa, First Mehl:

firstLine: ਜਿਨਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਕੀਤੀ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
translationEn: The One who created the day also created the night.
Raag Aasaa, Fourth Mehl, So Purakh ~ That Primal Being:
Sohilaa ~ The Song Of Praise. Raag Gauree Deepakee, First Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸੋਈ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਸੀ ਹੋਰੁ ਆਖਣੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
translationEn: The Hukam of Your Command is the pleasure of Your Will, Lord. To say anything else is far beyond anyone's reach.

firstLine: ਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਢੋਈ ਨ ਲਹੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਝੂਠੁ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: In this world, you shall not find any shelter; in the world hereafter, being false, you shall suffer. ||1||Pause||

firstLine: ਅੰਤਰ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਸੰਕ ਉਤਾਰਿ ॥
translationEn: Know the state of your inner being; meet with the Guru and get rid of your skepticism.
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Second House:
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Second House:
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Third House:
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Third House:
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Fourth House:
All the world continues coming and going in reincarnation. ||3||
Siree Raag, Third Mehl, First House:
Siree Raag, Third Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਇਹੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
translationEn: The blessing of this human life has been obtained, but still, people do not lovingly focus their thoughts on the Name of the Lord.
Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl, First House:
Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਐਥੈ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਵਡਾਈਆ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਥਾਉ ॥੩॥
translationEn: In this world you shall be blessed with greatness, and in the Court of the Lord you shall find your place of rest. ||3||
Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, Second House:
Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House:

firstLine: ਬੰਧਨ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਮੇਰੀ ਰਾਖੈ ਮਮਤਾ ॥੩॥
translationEn: He frees us from bondage, O Saints, and saves us from possessiveness. ||3||
Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਗਣਤ ਗਣਾਵਣਿ ਆਈਆ ਸੂਹਾ ਵੇਸੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
translationEn: But when the time comes to settle their accounts, their red robes are corrupt.

firstLine: ਮੁਖਿ ਝੂਠੈ ਝੂਠੁ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਸੂਚਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
translationEn: With false mouths, people speak falsehood. How can they be made pure?

firstLine: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਆਪਣੇ ਧੀਆ ਪੂਤ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ॥
translationEn: The self-willed manmukh looks upon his daughters, sons and relatives as his own.
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Second House:
Siree Raag, Third Mehl, First House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

firstLine: ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਤਾ ਖੜਿ ਰਸਾਤਲਿ ਦੀਤ ॥੭॥
translationEn: But still, if you do not come to remember the Supreme Lord God, then you shall be taken and consigned to the most hideous hell! ||7||
Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਦੂਜੈ ਪਹਰੈ ਰੈਣਿ ਕੈ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਵਿਸਰਿ ਗਇਆ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
translationEn: In the second watch of the night, O my merchant friend, you have forgotten to meditate.

firstLine: ਇਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਪੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਝੂਠੀ ਅੰਤਿ ਛੋਡਿ ਚਲਿਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਈ ॥
translationEn: This wealth, property and Maya are false. In the end, you must leave these, and depart in sorrow.
Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl, Second House, Chhant:
Chhants Of Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:
Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl, Vanajaaraa ~ The Merchant:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਸ੍ਰੀਰਾਗ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਬੇਣੀ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥ ਪਹਰਿਆ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਗਾਵਣਾ ॥
translationEn: Sree Raag, The Word Of Devotee Baynee Jee: To Be Sung To The Tune Of "Pehray":
Raag Maajh, Chau-Padhay, First House, Fourth Mehl:
Maajh, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, First House:
He is the Giver of all souls.
is rid of the illnesses of countless lifetimes and incarnations.
Raag Maajh, Ashtpadheeyaa: First Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਲਦੀ ਫਿਰੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਬਹੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
translationEn: Night and day, day and night, they burn. Without her Husband Lord, the soul-bride suffers in terrible pain. ||2||
Think of the Lord, who shall be your Help and Support in the end.
Subduing their desires, they merge with the True One;

firstLine: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਇਹੁ ਗੁਫਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
translationEn: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, search this cave.

firstLine: ਤਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: He has no form or shape; He is seen within each and every heart. The Gurmukh comes to know the unknowable. ||1||Pause||

firstLine: ਚਰਨ ਸੇਵ ਸੰਤ ਸਾਧ ਕੇ ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪੂਰੇ ॥੩॥
translationEn: Serving at the Feet of the Holy Saints, all desires are fulfilled. ||3||
Baarah Maahaa ~ The Twelve Months: Maajh, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:

firstLine: ਚੇਤਿ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਅਰਾਧੀਐ ਹੋਵੈ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਘਣਾ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Chayt, by meditating on the Lord of the Universe, a deep and profound joy arises.

firstLine: ਵੈਸਾਖਿ ਧੀਰਨਿ ਕਿਉ ਵਾਢੀਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਿਛੋਹੁ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Vaisaakh, how can the bride be patient? She is separated from her Beloved.

firstLine: ਹਰਿ ਜੇਠਿ ਜੁੜੰਦਾ ਲੋੜੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਅਗੈ ਸਭਿ ਨਿਵੰਨਿ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Jayt'h, the bride longs to meet with the Lord. All bow in humility before Him.

firstLine: ਆਸਾੜੁ ਤਪੰਦਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਗੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਹੁ ਨ ਜਿੰਨਾ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
translationEn: The month of Aasaarh seems burning hot, to those who are not close to their Husband Lord.

firstLine: ਸਾਵਣਿ ਸਰਸੀ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸਿਉ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Saawan, the soul-bride is happy, if she falls in love with the Lotus Feet of the Lord.

firstLine: ਭਾਦੁਇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਣੀਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗਾ ਹੇਤੁ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Bhaadon, she is deluded by doubt, because of her attachment to duality.

firstLine: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਪਿਆਸ ਦਰਸਨ ਘਣੀ ਕੋਈ ਆਣਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਮਾਇ ॥
translationEn: My mind and body are so thirsty for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. Won't someone please come and lead me to him, O my mother.

firstLine: ਕਤਿਕਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਦੋਸੁ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Katak, do good deeds. Do not try to blame anyone else.

firstLine: ਮੰਘਿਰਿ ਮਾਹਿ ਸੋਹੰਦੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਬੈਠੜੀਆਹ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Maghar, those who sit with their Beloved Husband Lord are beautiful.

firstLine: ਪੋਖਿ ਤੁਖਾਰੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪਈ ਕੰਠਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਹੁ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Poh, the cold does not touch those, whom the Husband Lord hugs close in His Embrace.

firstLine: ਮਾਘਿ ਮਜਨੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧੂਆ ਧੂੜੀ ਕਰਿ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Maagh, let your cleansing bath be the dust of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

firstLine: ਫਲਗੁਣਿ ਅਨੰਦ ਉਪਾਰਜਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਜਣ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੇ ਆਇ ॥
translationEn: In the month of Phalgun, bliss comes to those, unto whom the Lord, the Friend, has been revealed.

firstLine: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਕਾਜ ਸਰੇ ॥
translationEn: Those who meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord-their affairs are all resolved.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl: Day And Night:

firstLine: ਵਾਰ ਮਾਝ ਕੀ ਤਥਾ ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਮਲਕ ਮੁਰੀਦ ਤਥਾ ਚੰਦ੍ਰਹੜਾ ਸੋਹੀਆ ਕੀ ਧੁਨੀ ਗਾਵਣੀ ॥
translationEn: Vaar In Maajh, And Saloks Of The First Mehl: To Be Sung To The Tune Of "Malik Mureed And Chandrahraa Sohee-Aa"
He came and he went, and now, even his name has died.

firstLine: ਤੀਜੈ ਮੁਹੀ ਗਿਰਾਹ ਭੁਖ ਤਿਖਾ ਦੁਇ ਭਉਕੀਆ ॥
translationEn: In the third watch, both hunger and thirst bark for attention, and food is put into the mouth.

firstLine: ਦਯਿ ਵਿਗੋਏ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਵਿਗੁਤੇ ਫਿਟਾ ਵਤੈ ਗਲਾ ॥
translationEn: Ruined by the Merciful Lord, they wander around in disgrace, and their entire troop is contaminated.

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਚਉਪਦੇ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gauree Gwaarayree, First Mehl, Chau-Padhay & Dho-Padhay:
Those who are committed to the Naam, see the world as merely a temporary pasture.

firstLine: ਏਕਸੁ ਚਰਣੀ ਜੇ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਹਿ ਲਬਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਕੀ ਧਾਵਸਿਤਾ ॥੩॥
translationEn: If you focus your consciousness on the Feet of the One Lord, what reason would you have to chase after greed? ||3||
The mind becomes pure, when the True Lord dwells within.
O Nanak, attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, they are detached, in the perfect balance of Nirvaanaa. ||4||13||33||

firstLine: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਮੈ ਮੂਰਖ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਸਈਆ ॥
translationEn: O my Lord, I am so foolish; save me, O my Lord God!

firstLine: ਜਿਤਨੀ ਭੂਖ ਅਨ ਰਸ ਸਾਦ ਹੈ ਤਿਤਨੀ ਭੂਖ ਫਿਰਿ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
translationEn: The more one feels hunger for other tastes and pleasures, the more this hunger persists.
By great good fortune, you shall meet with the Lord. ||1||

firstLine: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਮਿਲੁ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੋਵਿੰਦਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਧਿ ਕਾਜੈ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੪॥੩੦॥੬੮॥
translationEn: By great good fortune, one joins the Sangat, the Holy Congregation, O my Lord of the Universe; O servant Nanak, through the Naam, one's affairs are resolved. ||4||4||30||68||
He is pleased at the sight of his elephants and horses

firstLine: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਗਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕਾ ਓਲਾ ॥
translationEn: O my mind, hold tight to the Support of the Lord's Name.
The infinite substance is within it.
It torments us with the expression of pleasure and pain.
The One Lord of the Universe is the Support of His humble servants.

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਚਉਪਦੇ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, Dho-Padhay:
With my feet, I walk on the Path of my Lord and Master. ||1||
All medicines and remedies, mantras and tantras are nothing more than ashes.
In the Society of the Saints, spiritual conversations take place.
Raag Gauree Chaytee, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Padhay:

firstLine: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਰਹੋਏ ਕੇ ਛੰਤ ਕੇ ਘਰਿ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
translationEn: Gauree Bairaagan, Chhants Of Rehoay, Fifth Mehl:
The slaves of God are good.

firstLine: ਮਾਨੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਦੋਊ ਸਮਾਨੇ ਮਸਤਕੁ ਡਾਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਾਗਿਓ ॥
translationEn: Honor and dishonor are the same to me; I have placed my forehead upon the Guru's Feet.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਸਾਧ ਮਗ ਸੁਨਿ ਕਰਿ ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: This mind listens to the Vedas, the Puraanas, and the ways of the Holy Saints, but it does not sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, for even an instant. ||1||Pause||

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gauree, Ashtpadheeyaa, First Mehl: Gauree Gwaarayree:
Because of the love of duality, God killed the demons.
Raag Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa:
The Gurmukh eradicates egotism from within.
They do not remember the Name of the Creator Lord.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Gauree Poorbee, Fourth Mehl, Karhalay:
The One Lord is the Creator of all things, the Cause of causes.

firstLine: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਦੀਨਾ ਜੀਉ ॥
translationEn: The Guru who gave me my soul,

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. By Guru's Grace:
Raag Gauree Poorbee, Chhant, Third Mehl:

firstLine: ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਕਰਉ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ਜੇ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਵੈ ਜਿਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਮਿਲਾਈਐ ॥
translationEn: I offer my prayers to the Guru; if it pleases the Guru, He shall unite me with Himself.

firstLine: ਇਸਤਰੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਾਮਿ ਵਿਆਪੇ ਜੀਉ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
translationEn: Men and women are obsessed with sex; they do not know the Way of the Lord's Name.

firstLine: ਮਾਇਆ ਬੰਧਨ ਟਿਕੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੰਤਾਏ ॥
translationEn: Bound by Maya, the mind is not stable. Each and every moment, it suffers in pain.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਨੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਹੋਤ ਜਾਤ ਸਭੁ ਧੂਰ ॥੧॥
translationEn: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, O Nanak, all are reduced to dust. ||1||

firstLine: ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਮਿਟੈ ਜਮ ਪੰਥ ਕੀ ਜਾਸੁ ਬਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
translationEn: One whose heart is filled with the Name shall have no fear on the path of death.
In this world, no one accomplishes anything by himself.
Sukhmani: Peace of Mind, the Nectar of the Name of God.

firstLine: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ॥
translationEn: In the remembrance of God are wealth, miraculous spiritual powers and the nine treasures.

firstLine: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚਾ ॥
translationEn: The remembrance of God is the highest and most exalted of all.
Those who remember God are wealthy.
Those who remember God generously help others.
Remembering God, one's works are accomplished.
Remembering the Lord, His devotees are famous and radiant.
The rulers of the all the world are unhappy;
You shall not be saved by hundreds of thousands and millions of helping hands.

firstLine: ਜਿਹ ਮਾਰਗ ਕੇ ਗਨੇ ਜਾਹਿ ਨ ਕੋਸਾ ॥
translationEn: On that path where the miles cannot be counted,
Unto the devotee, the Naam is an article of daily use.

firstLine: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ॥
translationEn: The Name of the Lord is the path of liberation for His humble servants.

firstLine: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਮਾਲੁ ਖਜੀਨਾ ॥
translationEn: The Lord's Name, Har, Har, is the treasure of wealth of His servants.
This Elysian Tree of miraculous powers is the Name of the Lord.

firstLine: ਨਉ ਖੰਡ ਪ੍ਰਿਥਮੀ ਫਿਰੈ ਚਿਰੁ ਜੀਵੈ ॥
translationEn: You may roam over the nine continents of the world and live a very long life;
With your mind filled with desire, you may give up your body at a sacred shrine of pilgrimage;

firstLine: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਸਿਆਣਪ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਬਿਆਪੈ ॥
translationEn: Even with great cleverness, the fear of death clings to you.
One who prays for the four cardinal blessings
Among all persons, the supreme person is the one
To the poor, Your Name is wealth.
Of all religions, the best religion

firstLine: ਜਿਹ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਧਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਬਸਹਿ ॥
translationEn: By His Grace, you abide in comfort upon the earth.
From beginning to end, He is our Protector,
Forsaking the jewel, they are engrossed with a shell.
They belong to the human species, but they act like animals.
By listening, how can the blind find the path?
So many lifetimes are wasted in these ways.
You are our Lord and Master; to You, I offer this prayer.
God the Banker gives endless capital to the mortal,
The many forms of attachment to Maya shall surely pass away
False are body, wealth, and all relations.
False are the ears which listen to the slander of others.
The life of the faithless cynic is totally useless.
He says one thing, and does something else.
Offer your prayers to the Supreme Lord God, who knows everything.
By His Grace, you wear silks and satins;
By His Grace, you have a healthy, golden body;
By His Grace, you wear decorations;

firstLine: ਜਿਹ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੁੰਨ ਬਹੁ ਦਾਨ ॥
translationEn: By His Grace, you give donations in abundance to charities;
By His Grace, you listen to the sound current of the Naad.
By His Grace, you are famous all over the world;
Those, whom He inspires to chant, chant His Name.
In the Company of the Holy, one meets the Incomprehensible Lord.
In the Company of the Holy, all one's enemies become friends.

firstLine: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
translationEn: In the Company of the Holy, the mind never wanders.

firstLine: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਫਲ ਜਨੰਮ ॥੫॥
translationEn: O Nanak, in the Company of the Holy, one's life becomes fruitful. ||5||

firstLine: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਹੀ ਕਛੁ ਘਾਲ ॥
translationEn: In the Company of the Holy, there is no suffering.

firstLine: ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੁਨਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
translationEn: In the Company of the Holy, listen to the Name of the Lord.

firstLine: ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਬੇਦ ਨ ਜਾਨਹਿ ॥
translationEn: The glory of the Holy people is not known to the Vedas.
The God-conscious being is the purest of the pure;
The God-conscious being is the dust of all.
The God-conscious being centers his hopes on the One alone.
The God-conscious being loves the One Lord alone.
The God-conscious being cannot be appraised.
The God-conscious being is himself the Formless Lord.
The true Vaishnaav, the devotee of Vishnu, is the one with whom God is thoroughly pleased.
The true Bhagaautee, the devotee of Adi Shakti, loves the devotional worship of God.
He is a true Pandit, a religious scholar, who instructs his own mind.
The Beej Mantra, the Seed Mantra, is spiritual wisdom for everyone.

firstLine: ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕਾ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
translationEn: One whose mind is a home for the Supreme Lord God
One who, in his soul, loves the Will of God,
All places belong to the Supreme Lord God.
Many millions are Siddhas, celibates and Yogis.
Many millions abide in heated activity, slothful darkness and peaceful light.
Many millions inhabit the nether regions.
Many millions become Bairaagees, who renounce the world.
Many millions are the fields of creation and the galaxies.
Many millions are the servants of the Supreme Lord God.
If it pleases God, one attains salvation.

firstLine: ਕਹੁ ਮਾਨੁਖ ਤੇ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਇ ਆਵੈ ॥
translationEn: Tell me - what can a mere mortal do?

firstLine: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਨੀਚ ਕੀਟ ਕਉ ਰਾਜ ॥
translationEn: In an instant, the lowly worm is transformed into a king.

firstLine: ਇਸ ਕਾ ਬਲੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਇਸੁ ਹਾਥ ॥
translationEn: There is no power in the hands of mortal beings;
Sometimes, they dance in various ways.
Sometimes, as scholars, they deliver lectures.
Sometimes, this being attains the Company of the Holy.
One who becomes wealthy and takes pride in it
If someone does millions of good deeds, while acting in ego,

firstLine: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਜਾਨੈ ਮੁਝ ਤੇ ਕਛੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
translationEn: As long as someone thinks that he is the one who acts,

firstLine: ਸਹਸ ਖਟੇ ਲਖ ਕਉ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
translationEn: Earning a thousand, he runs after a hundred thousand.
The Doer, the Cause of causes, is the Creator Lord.
He Himself instructs, and He Himself learns.
True, True, True is God, our Lord and Master.

firstLine: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਓਇ ਭੀ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
translationEn: O Nanak, if it pleases the Saint, even then, he may be saved. ||2||
The slanderer of the Saint is the worst evil-doer.
The slanderer of the Saint is forever impure.

firstLine: ਸੰਤ ਕਾ ਦੋਖੀ ਅਧ ਬੀਚ ਤੇ ਟੂਟੈ ॥
translationEn: The slanderer of the Saint breaks down mid-way.
The slanderer of the Saint bewails like this

firstLine: ਸੰਤ ਕਾ ਦੋਖੀ ਬਿਗੜ ਰੂਪੁ ਹੋਇ ਜਾਇ ॥
translationEn: The slanderer of the Saint becomes deformed.

firstLine: ਸਭ ਘਟ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਓਹੁ ਕਰਨੈਹਾਰੁ ॥
translationEn: All hearts are His; He is the Creator.
Praise the Formless Lord in your mind.
Very fortunate are those humble beings in this world,
By Guru's Grace, one understands himself;

firstLine: ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਨਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
translationEn: One who focuses his conscious mind on the Lord God

firstLine: ਨਹ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਨਮੈ ਨਹ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਰੈ ॥
translationEn: Nothing is born, and nothing dies.
Those who know God are glorious.

firstLine: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
translationEn: Whatever you do, do it for the Love of God.
One who is good-looking should not be vain;
As a palace is supported by its pillars,
You shall obtain your pre-ordained destiny.

firstLine: ਜਿਸੁ ਵਖਰ ਕਉ ਲੈਨਿ ਤੂ ਆਇਆ ॥
translationEn: This merchandise, which you have come to obtain

firstLine: ਚਰਨ ਸਾਧ ਕੇ ਧੋਇ ਧੋਇ ਪੀਉ ॥
translationEn: Wash the feet of the Holy, and drink in this water.
He infuses life back into the dead.

firstLine: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ॥
translationEn: One who has faith in the Guru in his mind
He is the Fulfiller of wishes, who can give us Sanctuary;

firstLine: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਲੀਲਾ ਕੀ ਮਿਤਿ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
translationEn: There is no limit to His play.

firstLine: ਨਾਨਾ ਰੂਪ ਨਾਨਾ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਰੰਗ ॥
translationEn: Many are His forms; many are His colors.
The Naam is the Support of all creatures.

firstLine: ਰੂਪੁ ਸਤਿ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਸਤਿ ਅਸਥਾਨੁ ॥
translationEn: His form is true, and true is His place.
True are the Teachings, and the Instructions of the Holy.
Gazing upon His wondrous wonder, I am wonder-struck and amazed!
One who believes in the Embodiment of Truth with all his heart
The servant is obedient to his Lord and Master.
He covers the faults of His servant.

firstLine: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਰਾਖਤ ਦੇ ਕਰਿ ਹਾਥ ॥
translationEn: He preserves them, and holds out His Hands to protect them.
Time after time, again and again, meditate on God.
Chant His Praises with your tongue, day and night.

firstLine: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਲੇਹਿ ॥
translationEn: O my mind, seek their protection;

firstLine: ਬੀਸ ਬਿਸਵੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
translationEn: One who obeys the Guru's Teachings one hundred per cent
Blessed is His Darshan; receiving it, one is purified.
The tongue is one, but His Praises are many.

firstLine: ਇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
translationEn: Only a few obtain this ambrosial essence of the Lord's Name.
In the burning heat, a soothing coolness prevails.
He Himself is absolute and unrelated; He Himself is also involved and related.

firstLine: ਜਿਸੁ ਧਨ ਕਉ ਚਾਰਿ ਕੁੰਟ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਵਹਿ ॥
translationEn: The wealth which you chase after in the four directions
Enlighten your mind with the Name of the Lord.
One who contemplates the essence of reality, is said to be the true person.
Your wealth shall not go with you;

firstLine: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਤੂੰ ਲੇਹਿ ਇਆਨੇ ॥
translationEn: Take the Guru's advice, you ignorant fool;
Chanting His Glories, your filth shall be washed off.
Meditate on the One, and worship the One.

firstLine: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਮਹਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
translationEn: By God's Gracious Glance, there is great peace.
The wishes of the Lord's servant are fulfilled.

firstLine: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਦੀਆ ॥
translationEn: Why forget Him, who has given us everything?
O friends, O Saints, make this your work.
Love and affection, and the taste of yearning, have welled up within;
God, the Forgiving Lord, is kind to the poor.
Everything is obtained: the heavens, liberation and deliverance,
He Himself has staged His own drama;
When there was only God the Master,
When the Immortal Lord was seated at ease,

firstLine: ਜਹ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪੁਰਖ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਤਾ ॥
translationEn: When there was only the Immaculate Being, the Lord of beings,

firstLine: ਜਬ ਅਪਨੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਆਪਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਨਾਈ ॥
translationEn: When His Glory was contained within Himself,
When the Undeceiveable, Impenetrable, Inscrutable One was self-absorbed,
When He Himself fashioned the visible world of the creation,
Wherever the Eternal Lord's devotee is, He Himself is there.

firstLine: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ੍ਰ ਸਭ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਹਾਥ ॥
translationEn: All beings and creatures are in His Hands.
The Perfect, Merciful Lord is pervading everywhere.
The Lord's humble servant is committed to His Name.
Join the Company of the Holy, and be happy.
Embellish both this world and the next;

firstLine: ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਹਾ ਕੋ ਜਾਇ ॥
translationEn: Where can anyone go, to get away from Him?

firstLine: ਮਤਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ॥
translationEn: His wisdom is perfect, and His Glance is Ambrosial.
In the forests, fields and mountains, He is the Supreme Lord God.
See Him in the Vedas, the Puraanas and the Simritees.

firstLine: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਾ ਪੇਖਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ॥
translationEn: In the eye of the Saint, everything is God.
He Himself is True, and all that He has made is True.
In all forms, He Himself is pervading.

firstLine: ਇਸ ਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਬੁਰਾ ॥
translationEn: If it comes from Him, it cannot be bad.

firstLine: ਜੋ ਜਾਨੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
translationEn: One who knows Him, obtains everlasting peace.
Happiness, intuitive peace, poise and bliss
The most sublime hymns are the Words of the Holy.
Hearing that He can give Sanctuary, I have come seeking His Sanctuary.

firstLine: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਮੀਤ ॥
translationEn: Sing the Praises of God, O Saints, O friends,
The most sublime wisdom and purifying baths;
One who chants this treasure in his mind

firstLine: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਸੁਨੈ ਲਾਇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
translationEn: One, within whose mind it abides, and who listens to it with love
T'hitee ~ The Lunar Days: Gauree, Fifth Mehl,
With your hands and feet, work for the Saints.

firstLine: ਸਭਿ ਕਾਰਜ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਸਿਧਿ ਹਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
translationEn: All the Gurmukh's affairs are brought to perfect completion; the Lord has showered him with His Mercy.

firstLine: ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਰਾਫੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਸੁਆਵਗੀਰ ਸਭਿ ਉਘੜਿ ਆਏ ॥
translationEn: When the True Guru, the Tester, observes with His Glance, the selfish ones are all exposed.

firstLine: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
translationEn: Great is the greatness of the Guru, who meditates on the Lord within.

firstLine: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਤੂ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੇ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਹੋਤਿ ॥੧੬॥
translationEn: O servant Nanak, praise the Naam, the Name of the Lord; this is your service to the Lord, the Truest of the True. ||16||

firstLine: ਜਿਨਾ ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਪੁਰਖ ਪਰਧਾਨ ॥
translationEn: Those who do not forget the Lord, with each and every breath and morsel of food, are the perfect and famous persons.

firstLine: ਗਉੜੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਰਾਇ ਕਮਾਲਦੀ ਮੋਜਦੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਕੀ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਰਿ ਗਾਵਣੀ ॥
translationEn: Gauree Kee Vaar, Fifth Mehl: Sung To The Tune Of Vaar Of Raa-I Kamaaldee-Mojadee:
To obtain the state of life of Nirvaanaa, meditate in remembrance on the One Lord.
Raag Gauree, The Word Of The Devotees:

firstLine: ਗਉੜੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ਨਾਲਿ ਰਲਾਇ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
translationEn: Gauree, Kabeer Jee, With Writings Of The Fifth Mehl:
My body was afflicted with millions of diseases.

firstLine: ਜਬ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: I have not taken the Lord's Name as my Support. ||1||Pause||

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਅਸਟਪਦੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gauree Gwaarayree, Ashtpadheeyaa Of Kabeer Jee:

firstLine: ਕਉਨੁ ਕੋ ਪੂਤੁ ਪਿਤਾ ਕੋ ਕਾ ਕੋ ॥
translationEn: Whose son is he? Whose father is he?

firstLine: ਅਬ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਭਏ ਰਾਜਾ ਰਾਮ ਸਹਾਈ ॥
translationEn: Now, the Lord, my King, has become my help and support.

firstLine: ਜਲਿ ਹੈ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਥਲਿ ਹੈ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਸੂਤਕ ਓਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
translationEn: There is pollution in the water, and pollution on the land; whatever is born is polluted.
Then she is known as the happy soul-bride, if she contemplates the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||3||

firstLine: ਉਰ ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਪਗੁ ਨਾ ਖਿਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਆਸਾ ॥੧॥
translationEn: Her heart is not happy, but she does not retrace her steps, in hopes of seeing the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||1||

firstLine: ਰਾਜਾ ਰਾਮ ਤੂੰ ਐਸਾ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਤਰਨ ਤਾਰਨ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: O my Sovereign Lord King, You are Fearless; You are the Carrier to carry us across, O my Lord King. ||1||Pause||
JHAJHA: You are entangled in the world, and you do not know how to get untangled.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੀਵਹੁ ਅਮਰ ਫਲ ਖਾਹੁ ॥੧੦॥
translationEn: you shall live throughout the ages, eating the fruit of immortality. ||10||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਚੇਤੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gauree Chaytee, The Word Of Naam Dayv Jee:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀ ਕੇ ਪਦੇ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gauree, Padhay Of Ravi Daas Jee, Gauree Gwaarayree:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
If one were to live and eat for hundreds of years,

firstLine: ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਛਪੈ ਕਿਉ ਛਪਿਆ ਏਕੀ ਏਕੀ ਵੰਡਿ ਦੀਆ ॥੪॥੭॥
translationEn: Says Nanak, by hiding, how can the Lord be hidden? He has given each their share, one by one. ||4||7||

firstLine: ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜੀਵਾਲੇ ਜੀਆ ਜਹ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਹ ਰਾਖੁ ਤੁਹੀ ॥੫॥੧੯॥
translationEn: Says Nanak, He grants life to the living beings; O Lord, please keep me according to Your Will. ||5||19||
With hope and desire, I approach His Bed,
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਬਾਬਾ ਜੁਗਤਾ ਜੀਉ ਜੁਗਹ ਜੁਗ ਜੋਗੀ ਪਰਮ ਤੰਤ ਮਹਿ ਜੋਗੰ ॥
translationEn: O father, the soul which is united in union as a Yogi, remains united in the supreme essence throughout the ages.
Raag Aasaa, Second House, Third Mehl:
He alone understands, whom the Lord Himself inspires to understand.
Aasaa, Eighth House, Kaafee, Third Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾਵਰੀ ਘਰੁ ੧੬ ਕੇ ੨ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਸੁਧੰਗ ॥
translationEn: Raag Aasaavaree, 2 Of Sixteenth House, Fourth Mehl, Sudhang:
Raag Aasaa, Second House, Fifth Mehl:

firstLine: ਦੂਖ ਰੋਗ ਭਏ ਗਤੁ ਤਨ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
translationEn: Pain and disease have left my body, and my mind has become pure; I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har.

firstLine: ਹਉ ਮਾਰਉ ਹਉ ਬੰਧਉ ਛੋਡਉ ਮੁਖ ਤੇ ਏਵ ਬਬਾੜੇ ॥
translationEn: He may proclaim, "I can kill anyone, I can capture anyone, and I can release anyone."
Raag Aasaa, Fifth House, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਨਿੰਦਕ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਕਤਹੂੰ ਨਾਹੀ ਖਸਮੈ ਏਵੈ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
translationEn: The slanderer shall never attain emancipation; this is the Will of the Lord and Master.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Day and night, I chant Your Name. ||1||

firstLine: ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਮਰਤਾ ਨਾ ਹਮ ਡਰਿਆ ॥
translationEn: He does not die, so I do not fear.
Aasaa, Eighth House, Kaafee, Fifth Mehl:

firstLine: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਮੰਨੇ ਆਪਿ ਸੋਈ ਮਾਨੀਐ ॥
translationEn: Those whom You approve, are approved.

firstLine: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਗੁ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰੀਐ ॥੨॥
translationEn: Serving the Guru, the Mansion of the Lord's Presence is obtained, and the impassable world-ocean is crossed over. ||2||

firstLine: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਸਗਲ ਸਮਗ੍ਰੀ ਸਭ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਅਸਨਾਹਾ ॥੧॥
translationEn: Children, wives, homes, and all possessions - attachment to all of these is false. ||1||
Raag Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Twelfth House:
Raag Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Thirteenth House:
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Fifteenth House, Partaal:
Raag Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Seventeenth House, Aasaavaree:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਫੁਨਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
translationEn: Whatever pleases Him, comes to pass.
By Guru's Grace, perform good deeds.
Raag Aasaa, First Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Third House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਜੋਗੀ ਭੋਗੀ ਕਾਪੜੀ ਕਿਆ ਭਵਹਿ ਦਿਸੰਤਰ ॥
translationEn: Why do the Yogis, the revellers, and the beggars wander in foreign lands?
Aasaa, Third Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Second House:

firstLine: ਨਾਮੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬੁਝੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਰਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: Through the Naam, the fire of desire is extinguished; the Naam is obtained by His Will. ||1||Pause||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
translationEn: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, with intuitive ease and poise, spiritual wisdom is revealed. ||1||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Second House:

firstLine: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਬਿਰਹੜੇ ਘਰੁ ੪ ਛੰਤਾ ਕੀ ਜਤਿ ॥
translationEn: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Birharray ~ Songs Of Separation, To Be Sung In The Tune Of The Chhants. Fourth House:

firstLine: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭ ਸਾਰੀ ਕੀਤੇ ਪਾਸਾ ਢਾਲਣਿ ਆਪਿ ਲਗਾ ॥੨੬॥
translationEn: He made all beings and creatures his chessmen, and He Himself threw the dice. ||26||
Raag Aasaa, Third Mehl, Patee - The Alphabet:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Aasaa, First Mehl, Chhant, First House:
Raag Aasaa, First Mehl, Chhant, Second House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਧਾਵਤੁ ਥੰਮਿੑਆ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਦਸਵਾ ਦੁਆਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
translationEn: The outgoing, wandering soul, upon meeting the True Guru, opens the Tenth Gate.
Raag Aasaa, Chhant, Fourth Mehl, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿਆ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਸਭਾਗਾ ॥
translationEn: I chant and meditate in adoration upon the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, according to the good destiny written upon my forehead.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Aasaa, Fourth Mehl, Chhant, Fifth House:

firstLine: ਬਿਖਮੋ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਅਖਾੜਾ ਮੈ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਜੀਤਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
translationEn: Meeting the Guru, I have won the most arduous battle in the arena of life.
Aasaa, Chhant, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Chhant, Sixth House:

firstLine: ਗੁਪਤ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਅਰਾਧਹਿ ਪਉਣ ਪਾਣੀ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
translationEn: The invisible and visible beings worship Him in adoration, along with wind and water, day and night.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Chhant, Seventh House:

firstLine: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਅਨੇਕ ਬੀਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਸੰਗ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਛੁ ਨਹ ਗਤੇ ॥
translationEn: I passed through so many births and deaths; without Union with the Beloved, I did not obtain salvation.

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

firstLine: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਗਲੀਈ ਢੂਢੀਐ ਕਥਨਾ ਕਰੜਾ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
translationEn: Wisdom cannot be found through mere words. To explain it is as hard as iron.
Wearing blue robes, they seek the approval of the Muslim rulers.

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Naarada the sage, and Shaarada the goddess of knowledge, serve the Lord.

firstLine: ਆਸਾ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੇ ਪੰਚਪਦੇ ੯ ਦੁਤੁਕੇ ੫ ॥
ਆਸਾ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੇ ਤਿਪਦੇ ੮ ਦੁਤੁਕੇ ੭ ਇਕਤੁਕਾ ੧ ॥
translationEn: Aasaa Of Kabeer Jee, 8 Thri-Padhay, 7 Dho-Thukay, 1 Ik-Tuka:

firstLine: ਆਸਾ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੇ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥

translationEn: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Drink in the sublime elixir of the Lord, O deceitful one. ||3||4||

firstLine: ਆਸਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Aasaa, The Word Of The Reverend Ravi Daas Jee:

firstLine: ਆਸਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਧੰਨੇ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Aasaa, The Word Of Devotee Dhanna Jee:

firstLine: ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਸੁਨਿ ਕੈ ਜਾਟਰੋ ਉਠਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
translationEn: Hearing this, Dhanna the Jaat applied himself to devotional worship.

firstLine: ਰੇ ਚਿਤ ਚੇਤਸਿ ਕੀ ਨ ਦਯਾਲ ਦਮੋਦਰ ਬਿਬਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਨਸਿ ਕੋਈ ॥
translationEn: O my consciousness, why don't you remain conscious of the Merciful Lord? How can you recognize any other?

firstLine: ਆਸਾ ਸੇਖ ਫਰੀਦ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
translationEn: Aasaa, The Word Of Shaykh Fareed Jee:

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
Raag Goojaree, Third Mehl, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, First House:
Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, Second House:
Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Panch-Pada, Second House:

firstLine: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸਿ ਮਾਤਾ ॥
translationEn: Twenty-four hours a day, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, absorbed in loving devotional worship.
Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Padhay, Second House:
Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Chau-Padhay:
Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Dho-Padhay:
Goojaree, Ashtpadheeyaa, First Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਾਕਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਾ ਜਮ ਕਾਣਿ ਨ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਬਾਕੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: One whose heart is filled with the Hymns of the True Guru, obtains the Pure Lord. He is not under the power of the Messenger of Death, nor does he owe Death anything. ||1||Pause||

firstLine: ਜਿਉ ਬੋਲਾਵਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਬੋਲਹ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਵਨ ਹਮਾਰੀ ॥
translationEn: As You cause me to speak, so do I speak, O Lord Master. What other power do I have?

firstLine: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਸਿਕੰਦਰ ਬਿਰਾਹਿਮ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਕੀ ਧੁਨੀ ਗਾਉਣੀ ॥
translationEn: Goojaree Ki Vaar, Third Mehl, Sung In The Tune Of The Vaar Of Sikandar & Biraahim:

firstLine: ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
translationEn: The Lord, the Giver of peace, shall dwell in your mind, and your egotism and pride shall depart.

firstLine: ਵਾਹੁ ਵਾਹੁ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
translationEn: Chant Waaho! Waaho! to the Lord, who is permeating and pervading in all.

firstLine: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਭ ਫਲ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
translationEn: Serving my True Guru, I have obtained all the fruits.

firstLine: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ਸਗਲੇ ਦੂਖ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
translationEn: Remembering Him in meditation, happiness comes, and all sorrows and pains simply vanish. ||2||

firstLine: ਭਗਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਇਆਲ ਓਨੑਾ ਮਿਹਰ ਪਾਇ ॥
translationEn: O Merciful Lord, You bless Your devotees with Your Grace.
Raag Goojaree, The Words Of The Devotees:

firstLine: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਵ ਜੀ ਕੇ ਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
translationEn: Goojaree, Padhay Of Naam Dayv Jee, First House:

firstLine: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀ ਕੇ ਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
translationEn: Goojaree, Padhay Of Ravi Daas Jee, Third House:

firstLine: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨ ਜੀਉ ਕੇ ਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
translationEn: Goojaree, Padhay Of Trilochan Jee, First House:

firstLine: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਜੈਦੇਵ ਜੀਉ ਕਾ ਪਦਾ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
translationEn: Goojaree, Padhay Of Jai Dayv Jee, Fourth House:

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl, Third House:
Raag Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:
Raag Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House:
Raag Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House:
Raag Dayv-Gandhaaree, Fifth Mehl, Seventh House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Bihaagraa, Chhant, Fourth Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮੇਰੀ ਜਿੰਦੁੜੀਏ ਸਭਿ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੋ ਰਾਮ ॥੧॥
translationEn: Nanak has found peace, meditating on the Lord, O my soul; the Lord is the Destroyer of all pain. ||1||

firstLine: ਆਵਣੁ ਤ ਜਾਣਾ ਤਿਨਹਿ ਕੀਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਮੇਦਨਿ ਸਿਰਜੀਆ ॥
translationEn: The One who fashioned the world causes them to come and go.

firstLine: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮੁਰਾਰੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
translationEn: In their minds, the Gurmukhs do not forget the Dear Lord, the Primal Creator Lord.

firstLine: ਬਿਨਵੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰ ਦੇਇ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਰਾ ॥੪॥
translationEn: Prays Nanak, please, give me Your Hand and save me, O Lord of the Universe, Merciful to the meek. ||4||

firstLine: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੂਲਹੁ ਭੁਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
translationEn: The self-willed manmukhs have been led astray from the very beginning; within them lurks greed, avarice and ego.

firstLine: ਜਿ ਤੁਧ ਨੋ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਸੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਕੇਰੀ ॥
translationEn: One who praises You obtains everything; You bestow Your Mercy upon him, O Immaculate Lord.

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

firstLine: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਮੇਲਾਵੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਹਉ ਵਾਰਿ ਵਾਰਿ ਆਪਣੇ ਗੁਰੂ ਕਉ ਜਾਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: The Perfect Guru leads me to meet my Beloved; I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to my Guru. ||1||Pause||

firstLine: ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਆਸ ਪੁਜਾਏ ॥੪॥
translationEn: Hail, hail unto the Guru, the Guru, the Perfect True Guru, who fulfills Nanak's heart's desires. ||4||
You Yourself are the Cause of causes, You Yourself are the Creator.

firstLine: ਲਿਖੇ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਬੋਲਿ ਬੋਲਿ ਗਵਾਈਐ ॥
translationEn: Without pre-ordained destiny, understanding is not attained; talking and babbling, one wastes his life away.

firstLine: ਪਿਰੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ਵੇਖੁ ਹਜੂਰੇ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
translationEn: The Lord is all-pervading everywhere; behold Him ever-present. Throughout the ages, know Him as the One.

firstLine: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਵੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੋ ॥੩॥
translationEn: O Nanak, through the Shabad, one meets the Lord, the Destroyer of fear, and by the destiny written on her forehead, she enjoys Him. ||3||

firstLine: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੇ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
translationEn: The filth of attachment to Maya clings to their hearts; they deal in Maya alone.

firstLine: ਏਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸ੍ਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੀ ॥
translationEn: I see the One Lord, and I know the One Lord; I realize Him within my soul.

firstLine: ਜਿਨੀ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਖ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
translationEn: Those who have not obtained the Blessed Vision, the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of the True Guru, the Almighty Lord God,
Wadahans, Fourth Mehl, Ghorees ~ The Wedding Procession Songs:

firstLine: ਗਿਆਨ ਮੰਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਚੰਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਜਾਣੀਆ ॥
translationEn: I ask for the Lord's spiritual wisdom, and the Lord's sublime sermon; through the Name of the Lord, I have come to know His value and His state.
Raag Wadahans, Fifth Mehl, Chhant, Fourth House:
Raag Wadahans, First Mehl, Fifth House, Alaahanees ~ Songs Of Mourning:

firstLine: ਸੂਰੇ ਸੇਈ ਆਗੈ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੀ ਮਾਣੋ ॥
translationEn: They alone are acclaimed as brave warriors in the world hereafter, who receive true honor in the Court of the Lord.

firstLine: ਹਉ ਮੁਠੜੀ ਧੰਧੈ ਧਾਵਣੀਆ ਪਿਰਿ ਛੋਡਿਅੜੀ ਵਿਧਣਕਾਰੇ ॥
translationEn: I too have been defrauded, chasing after worldly entanglements; my Husband Lord has forsaken me - I practice the evil deeds of a wife without a spouse.

firstLine: ਵਡਹੰਸ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਲਲਾਂ ਬਹਲੀਮਾ ਕੀ ਧੁਨਿ ਗਾਵਣੀ ॥
translationEn: Vaar Of Wadahans, Fourth Mehl: To Be Sung In The Tune Of Lalaa-Behleemaa:

firstLine: ਦੁਖਿ ਲਗੈ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਅਗੈ ਦੂਣੀ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
translationEn: Afflicted with pain, he wanders from house to house, and in the world hereafter, he receives double punishment.

firstLine: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
translationEn: I am forever a sacrifice to that Guru, who has led me to serve the Lord.

firstLine: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਨਿ ਮੁਹਿ ਕਾਲੈ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
translationEn: O Nanak, without serving the True Guru, they are bound and beaten in the City of Death; they arise and depart with blackened faces. ||1||

firstLine: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਧ ਨ ਚੇਤਨੀ ਜਨਮਿ ਮਰਿ ਹੋਹਿ ਬਿਨਾਸਿ ॥
translationEn: The blind, self-willed manmukhs do not think of the Lord; they are ruined through birth and death.

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

firstLine: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਕਉ ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਬਪੁੜੋ ਇਨਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਿਸਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥
translationEn: This wretched world is caught in birth and death; in the love of duality, it has forgotten devotional worship of the Lord.

firstLine: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰਹੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੀਵਹੁ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਤਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
translationEn: Dying in the Word of the Shabad, you shall live forever, and you shall never die again.

firstLine: ਆਪੇ ਕਾਸਟ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਕਾਸਟ ਅਗਨਿ ਰਖਾਇਆ ॥
translationEn: The Beloved Lord Himself is the firewood, and He Himself keeps the fire within the wood.

firstLine: ਗਲਿ ਜੇਵੜੀ ਆਪੇ ਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਜਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਖਿੰਚੈ ਤਿਉ ਜਾਹਾ ॥
translationEn: The Beloved Himself puts the chains around their necks; as God pulls them, must they go.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, First House, Thi-Thukay:

firstLine: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੩॥
translationEn: By great good fortune, I found the Guru, O Siblings of Destiny, and I meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||
O my mind, emancipation is attained in the Sanctuary of the Holy Saints.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Chau-Padhay:

firstLine: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਜਉ ਤੁਮਹਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਓ ਤਉ ਸੁਨੀ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
translationEn: When You brought me to the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, then I heard the Bani of Your Word.

firstLine: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪੁਨੋ ਕਰਿ ਲੀਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥੨॥
translationEn: By His Mercy, He has made me His own, and the imperishable Lord has come to dwell within my mind. ||2||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Dho-Padhay:
Meditating on the Supreme Lord God, I am forever in ecstasy. ||Pause||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Chau-Padhay:

firstLine: ਸੰਤ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਧਰਮ ਕੀ ਪਉੜੀ ਕੋ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪਾਏ ॥
translationEn: The way of the Saints is the ladder of righteous living, found only by great good fortune.

firstLine: ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਸੁਣੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ॥
translationEn: Becoming kind and compassionate, God the Lord and Master Himself listens to my prayer.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Dho-Padhay:
I worship and adore the Perfect Guru.
Sorat'h, First Mehl, First House, Ashtpadheeyaa, Chau-Thukay:

firstLine: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਨਸਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥੪॥
translationEn: Overcoming my egotism and quieting the desires within my mind, I have come to realize the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||4||

firstLine: ਮੇਰਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਛੋਡੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਹੋਈਐ ਸਭ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
translationEn: Give up your sense of mine and yours, O Siblings of Destiny, and become the dust of the feet of all.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Ashtpadheeyaa:
Vaar Of Raag Sorat'h, Fourth Mehl:

firstLine: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਸਿਸਟਿ ਸਿਰਜੀਆ ਆਪੇ ਫੁਨਿ ਗੋਈ ॥
translationEn: You Yourself created the world, and You Yourself shall destroy it in the end.

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੋਰਠਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
translationEn: Raag Sorat'h, The Word Of Devotee Kabeer Jee, First House:

firstLine: ਜਬ ਜਰੀਐ ਤਬ ਹੋਇ ਭਸਮ ਤਨੁ ਰਹੈ ਕਿਰਮ ਦਲ ਖਾਈ ॥
translationEn: When the body is burnt, it turns to ashes; if it is not cremated, then it is eaten by armies of worms.

firstLine: ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਸਭੈ ਮਤ ਸੁਨਿ ਕੈ ਕਰੀ ਕਰਮ ਕੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
translationEn: Listening to all the teachings of the Vedas and the Puraanas, I wanted to perform the religious rituals.

firstLine: ਜਾ ਕੇ ਨਿਗਮ ਦੂਧ ਕੇ ਠਾਟਾ ॥
translationEn: Let the sacred scriptures be your milk and cream,
Without Him, we cannot even live;
What use is it to read, and what use is it to study?
In his heart there is deception, and yet in his mouth are words of wisdom.
O Saints, my windy mind has now become peaceful and still.

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੋਰਠਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਨਾਮਦੇ ਜੀ ਕੀ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
translationEn: Raag Sorat'h, The Word Of Devotee Naam Dayv Jee, Second House:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੋਰਠਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Sorat'h, The Word Of Devotee Ravi Daas Jee:

firstLine: ਜਉ ਹਮ ਬਾਂਧੇ ਮੋਹ ਫਾਸ ਹਮ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਧਨਿ ਤੁਮ ਬਾਧੇ ॥
translationEn: If I am bound by the noose of emotional attachment, then I shall bind You, Lord, with the bonds of love.

firstLine: ਦੁਲਭ ਜਨਮੁ ਪੁੰਨ ਫਲ ਪਾਇਓ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਤ ਅਬਿਬੇਕੈ ॥
translationEn: I obtained this precious human life as a reward for my past actions, but without discriminating wisdom, it is wasted in vain.

firstLine: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਸੁਰਤਰ ਚਿੰਤਾਮਨਿ ਕਾਮਧੇਨੁ ਬਸਿ ਜਾ ਕੇ ॥
translationEn: He is the ocean of peace; the miraculous tree of life, the wish-fulfilling jewel, and the Kaamadhayna, the cow which fulfills all desires, all are in His power.

firstLine: ਸਾਚੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਹਮ ਤੁਮ ਸਿਉ ਜੋਰੀ ॥
translationEn: I am joined in true love with You, Lord.

firstLine: ਜਲ ਕੀ ਭੀਤਿ ਪਵਨ ਕਾ ਥੰਭਾ ਰਕਤ ਬੁੰਦ ਕਾ ਗਾਰਾ ॥
translationEn: The body is a wall of water, supported by the pillars of air; the egg and sperm are the mortar.
I am a shoemaker, but I do not know how to mend shoes.

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੋਰਠਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਭੀਖਨ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Sorat'h, The Word Of Devotee Bheekhan Jee:

firstLine: ਐਸਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮੋਲਕੁ ਪੁੰਨਿ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
translationEn: Such is the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the invaluable jewel, the most sublime wealth, which I have found through good deeds.
Dhanaasaree, First Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:
Dhanaasaree, Third Mehl, Second House, Chau-Padhay:

firstLine: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਆਪੇ ਸਚਿ ਲਾਏ ॥੪॥੭॥
translationEn: O Nanak, the Lord Himself sees all; He Himself links us to the Truth. ||4||7||
Raag Dhanaasaree, Third Mehl, Fourth House:
Dhanaasaree, Fourth Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:
Dhanaasaree, Fourth Mehl, Fifth House, Dho-Padhay:
Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:

firstLine: ਅਲੰਕਾਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਥੈਲੀ ਹੋਈ ਹੈ ਤਾ ਤੇ ਕਨਿਕ ਵਖਾਨੀ ॥੩॥
translationEn: When golden ornaments are melted down into a lump, they are still said to be gold. ||3||

firstLine: ਤਾਣੁ ਮਾਣੁ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਟੇਕ ॥੪॥੨॥੨੦॥
translationEn: The True Lord is Nanak's strength, honor and support; He alone is his protection. ||4||2||20||
Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Chau-Padhay:
Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Eighth House, Dho-Padhay:

firstLine: ਧੰਨਿ ਸੁ ਥਾਨੁ ਧੰਨਿ ਓਇ ਭਵਨਾ ਜਾ ਮਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਬਸਾਰੇ ॥
translationEn: Blessed is that place, and blessed is that house, in which the Saints dwell.

firstLine: ਮਹਾ ਕਲੋਲ ਬੁਝਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ॥
translationEn: Please shower Your Mercy upon me, and permit me to ignore the great enticements of Maya, O Lord, Merciful to the meek.
Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Ninth House, Partaal:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਜੋਬਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭਤਾ ਕੈ ਮਦ ਮੈ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਰਹੈ ਦਿਵਾਨਾ ॥੧॥
translationEn: In the pride of youth, wealth and glory, day and night, he remains intoxicated. ||1||
Dhanaasaree, First Mehl, Second House, Ashtpadheeyaa:
Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House, Ashtapadee:

firstLine: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੂਛਉ ਜਾਇ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥
translationEn: I shall go and ask the True Guru, and meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Dhanaasaree, Chhant, Fourth Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Dhanaasaree, The Word Of Devotee Kabeer Jee:

firstLine: ਦਿਨ ਤੇ ਪਹਰ ਪਹਰ ਤੇ ਘਰੀਆਂ ਆਵ ਘਟੈ ਤਨੁ ਛੀਜੈ ॥
translationEn: Day by day, hour by hour, life runs its course, and the body withers away.

firstLine: ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਛੁ ਜਾਨੈ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਅਚਰਜੁ ਕਾਹੋ ॥
translationEn: That humble being, who knows even a little about loving devotional worship - what surprises are there for him?
Mortals may go to the Realm of Indra, or the Realm of Shiva,

firstLine: ਰਾਮ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਭਾਈ ॥
translationEn: Remember the Lord, remember the Lord, remember the Lord in meditation, O Siblings of Destiny.

firstLine: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕੈਰਉ ਕਰਤੇ ਦੁਰਜੋਧਨ ਸੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
translationEn: The Kaurvas, who had brothers like Duryodhan, used to proclaim, "This is ours! This is ours!"

firstLine: ਦਸ ਬੈਰਾਗਨਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਬਸਿ ਕੀਨੑੀ ਪੰਚਹੁ ਕਾ ਮਿਟ ਨਾਵਉ ॥
translationEn: I have brought the ten sensory organs under my control, and erased every trace of the five thieves.

firstLine: ਮਾਰਵਾੜਿ ਜੈਸੇ ਨੀਰੁ ਬਾਲਹਾ ਬੇਲਿ ਬਾਲਹਾ ਕਰਹਲਾ ॥
translationEn: As water is very precious in the desert, and the creeper weeds are dear to the camel,
First of all, the lotuses bloomed in the woods;
O Lord, You are the Purifier of sinners - this is Your innate nature.

firstLine: ਚਿਤ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਕਰਉ ਨੈਨ ਅਵਿਲੋਕਨੋ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ਬਾਨੀ ਸੁਜਸੁ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਾਖਉ ॥
translationEn: In my consciousness, I remember You in meditation; with my eyes, I behold You; I fill my ears with the Word of Your Bani, and Your Sublime Praise.
Your Name, Lord, is my adoration and cleansing bath.
Dhanaasaree, The Word Of Devotee Trilochan Jee:
Jaitsree, Fourth Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:
Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Dho-Padhay:
Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Dho-Padhay:
Jaitsree, Ninth Mehl: One Universal Creator God.
Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl, Chhant, First House:
Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Chhant:
Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl, Vaar With Saloks:
Jaitsree, The Word Of The Devotees:

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
Todee, Fifth Mehl, First House, Dho-Padhay:
Todee, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Chau-Padhay:
Todee, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Dho-Padhay:

firstLine: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸੰਗਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਸੁਰਿ ਜਨ ਮਿਲੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
translationEn: My mind is in love with the Lord's lotus feet; I have met the Beloved Guru, the noble, heroic being.
Todee, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Chau-Padhay:
Todee, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Dho-Padhay:
Todee, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House, Dho-Padhay:
Todee, The Word Of The Devotees:
Here is a verse with a three-fold play on words. ||1||Pause||
Raag Bairaaree, Fourth Mehl, First House, Dho-Padhay:
Raag Bairaaree, Fifth Mehl, First House:
Raag Tilang, First Mehl, First House:
You are, You are, and You shall ever be,

firstLine: ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਾੜੀ ਹੈ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥
translationEn: He Himself knows, and He Himself acts; He laid out the garden of the world. ||1||

firstLine: ਤਿਲੰਗ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ॥
translationEn: Tilang, The Word Of Devotee Kabeer Jee:
Hello, my friend, hello my friend. Is there any good news?

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
Raag Soohee, Fourth Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਕਰਿ ਰੰਙੁ ॥
translationEn: O my mind, enshrine love for the Name of the Lord.

firstLine: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਲੋਚੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੩॥
translationEn: Even if he wishes it a hundred times, he does not obtain the Lord's Love. ||3||
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਖਿਨੁ ਰਹਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਉ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਗ ਪਾਗੇ ॥
translationEn: I cannot survive, even for an instant, without the feet of my Beloved.
Grasping the Lord's Feet, O Nanak, we enter His Sanctuary. ||4||22||28||
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House, Partaal:
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House:
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Seventh House:

firstLine: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਉਧਰੈ ਸੋ ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਾਝਾ ॥੪॥੩॥੫੦॥
translationEn: One who, as Gurmukh, chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is saved. In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, O Nanak, God is permeating the hearts of each and every being. ||4||3||50||

firstLine: ਭਾਗਠੜੇ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ਜਿਨੑ ਘਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥
translationEn: Your Saints are very fortunate; their homes are filled with the wealth of the Lord's Name.

firstLine: ਤੇਰੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕਉ ਭਉ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਆਵੈ ਨੇਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: Your servant is not afraid of anything; the Messenger of Death cannot even approach him. ||1||Pause||
Raag Soohee, Ashtapadee, First Mehl, First House:
Soohee, First Mehl, Kaafee, Tenth House:
You Yourself establish and disestablish; through the Word of Your Shabad, You elevate and exalt. ||5||
Raag Soohee, Third Mehl, First House, Ashtpadheeyaa:

firstLine: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹੁ ਸਚੇ ਵਣਜਾਰੇ ਓਥੈ ਕੂੜੇ ਨਾ ਟਿਕੰਨਿ ॥
translationEn: True is the Banker, and True are His traders. The false ones cannot remain there.
Raag Soohee, Ashtpadheeyaa, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

firstLine: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਮ ਕਾ ਮੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਖਣ ਕਾ ਚਾਉ ॥
translationEn: The True Guru is the Ocean of Virtue of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. I have such a yearning to see Him!
Raag Soohee, Ashtpadheeyaa, Fifth Mehl, First House:
Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Third House:

firstLine: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣਾ ਰਹਿ ਗਏ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
translationEn: My comings and goings have ended; the Formless Lord now dwells within my mind.

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੧੦ ਕਾਫੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Tenth House, Kaafee:
Raag Soohee, First Mehl, Kuchajee ~ The Ungraceful Bride:
Soohee, First Mehl, Suchajee ~ The Noble And Graceful Bride:
Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Gunvantee ~ The Worthy And Virtuous Bride:
Raag Soohee, Chhant, First Mehl, First House:
Raag Soohee, First Mehl, Chhant, Second House:

firstLine: ਸਗਲੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਤੂ ਸੋਈ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
translationEn: Your Light is in everyone; through it, You are known. Through love, You are easily met.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਪੁੰਨ ਪੂਜਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
translationEn: The sixty-eight holy places of pilgrimage, charity and worship, are found in the love of the True Name.
Raag Soohee, Chhant, Third Mehl, Second House:

firstLine: ਕੋਟਿ ਮਧੇ ਕਿਨੈ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
translationEn: Among millions, there is scarcely one who realizes the Name of the True Lord.
Raag Soohee, Fourth Mehl, Chhant, First House:

firstLine: ਜਨੁ ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਲਾਵ ਪਹਿਲੀ ਆਰੰਭੁ ਕਾਜੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
translationEn: Servant Nanak proclaims that, in this, the first round of the marriage ceremony, the marriage ceremony has begun. ||1||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Soohee, Chhant, Fourth Mehl, Third House:
Raag Soohee, Chhant, Fifth Mehl, First House:

firstLine: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੈ ਘਰਿ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
translationEn: The Lord's Ambrosial Nectar is an overflowing treasure; everything is in His Home. I am a sacrifice to the Lord.
Raag Soohee, Chhant, Fifth Mehl, Second House:
Raag Soohee, Chhant, Fifth Mehl, Third House:

firstLine: ਪੇਖਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਗਸੇ ਆਪਿ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥੪॥੫॥੮॥
translationEn: Beholding the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, Nanak has blossomed forth; the Lord has united him in Union. ||4||5||8||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਸਭ ਭਵਿ ਥਕੀ ਕਿਨਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
translationEn: All have grown weary of wandering throughout the four ages, but none know the Lord's worth.

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਤਥਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ॥ ਕਬੀਰ ਕੇ ॥
translationEn: Raag Soohee, The Word Of Kabeer Jee, And Other Devotees. Of Kabeer

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Soohee, The Word Of Sree Ravi Daas Jee:
Raag Soohee, The Word Of Shaykh Fareed Jee:

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:
Such is the Name of the Immaculate, Divine Lord.
Raag Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl, Third House:

firstLine: ਹਰਿ ਭਰਿਪੁਰੇ ਰਹਿਆ ॥ ਜਲਿ ਥਲੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ॥ ਨਿਤ ਗਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਸਾਰਨੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: The Lord is totally permeating and pervading everywhere; The Name of the Lord is pervading the water and the land. So sing continuously of the Lord, the Dispeller of pain. ||1||Pause||
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, First House:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਯਾਨੜੀਏ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਗਾਵਣਾ ॥
translationEn: Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Second House, To Be Sung To The Tune Of Yaan-Ree-Ay:
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:
lovingly centering your consciousness on the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||1||
Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Creator Lord, the Architect of Destiny, I am fulfilled. ||3||
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Dho-Padhay:
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House, Chau-Padhay:

firstLine: ਪਾਵਉ ਧੂਰਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਸ ਕੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀ ॥੪॥੩॥੩੩॥
translationEn: Please bless me with the dust of the feet of Your slaves; Nanak is a sacrifice. ||4||3||33||

firstLine: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਦਾਸੁ ਤੁਮੑ ਬਾਣੀ ਜਨ ਆਖੀ ॥
translationEn: Your slave lives by hearing, hearing the Word of Your Bani, chanted by Your humble servant.

firstLine: ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਕਦੇ ਮੂਲਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
translationEn: There is never any deficiency at all; the Lord's treasures are over-flowing.
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Padhay, Fifth House:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਚਉਪਦੇ ਦੁਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੬ ॥
translationEn: Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay And Dho-Padhay, Sixth House:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਚਉਪਦੇ ਦੁਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੭ ॥
translationEn: Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay And Dho-Padhay, Seventh House:

firstLine: ਕਹਾ ਕਰੈ ਕੋਈ ਬੇਚਾਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰੇ ਕਾ ਬਡ ਪਰਤਾਪੁ ॥੧॥
translationEn: What can any wretched creature do to me? The radiance of my God is gloriously great. ||1||
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Padhay, Eighth House:
Here, and hereafter, there is happiness.
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Padhay, Ninth House:

firstLine: ਅਨਿਕ ਭਗਤ ਅਨਿਕ ਜਨ ਤਾਰੇ ਸਿਮਰਹਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਮੁਨੀ ॥
translationEn: You have saved so many devotees, so many humble servants; so many silent sages contemplate You.
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Thirteenth House, Partaal:
Bilaaval, Ashtpadheeyaa, First Mehl, Tenth House:
Bilaaval, Third Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Tenth House:
Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Eleventh House:
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Twelfth House:
Bilaaval, First Mehl, T'hitee ~ The Lunar Days, Tenth House, To The Drum-Beat Jat:
Bilaaval, Third Mehl, The Seven Days, Tenth House:
The self-willed manmukhs waste away their lives, and die.
Chhant, Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl, Mangal ~ The Song Of Joy:

firstLine: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭੇਟਿਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖੀ ਹੋਤ ਇਹੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
translationEn: Meeting with God, the Ocean of Peace, O Nanak, this soul becomes happy. ||1||

firstLine: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਜਨਮਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਏ ॥
translationEn: The ignorant self-willed manmukhs are blind. They are born, only to die again, and continue coming and going.

firstLine: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ॥ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Bilaaval, The Word Of The Devotees. Of Kabeer Jee:

firstLine: ਜਰਾ ਜੀਵਨ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਗਇਆ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਆ ਨ ਨੀਕਾ ॥
translationEn: Youth and old age - my entire life has passed, but I haven't done any good.
Abandon your Yogic postures and breath control exercises, O madman.

firstLine: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਨਾਮਦੇਵ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Bilaaval, The Word Of Devotee Naam Dayv Jee:
Bilaaval, The Word Of Devotee Ravi Daas:
The Word Of Sadhana, Raag Bilaaval:

firstLine: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
translationEn: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

firstLine: ਮਿਲੁ ਮਿਲੁ ਸਖੀ ਗੁਣ ਕਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਲੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਧੀਰ ॥੩॥
translationEn: Come, and join together, O my companions; let's sing the Glorious Praises of my God, and follow the comforting advice of the True Guru.. ||3||
Raag Gond, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, First House:
Raag Gond, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, Second House:
Day and night, Nanak meditates on the Naam.
Raag Gond, Ashtpadheeyaa, Fifth Mehl, Second House:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੋਂਡ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ॥ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gond, The Word Of The Devotees. Kabeer Jee, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੋਂਡ ਬਾਣੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gond, The Word Of Kabeer Jee, Second House:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੋਂਡ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਜੀ ਕੀ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gond, The Word Of Naam Dayv Jee, First House:

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੋਂਡ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gond, The Word Of Naam Dayv Jee, Second House:

firstLine: ਪਾਂਡੇ ਤੁਮਰਾ ਰਾਮਚੰਦੁ ਸੋ ਭੀ ਆਵਤੁ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਥਾ ॥
translationEn: O Pandit, I saw your Raam Chand coming too

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਗੋਂਡ ਬਾਣੀ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
translationEn: Raag Gond, The Word Of Ravi Daas Jee, Second House:
Raamkalee, First Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:
has the wisdom of the six Shaastras. ||4||5||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
O humble servant of the Lord, follow the Guru's Teachings, and chant the Name of the Lord.
Raag Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, First House:
Raag Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, Second House:
They obtain a permanent seat in the infinite. ||2||
In the third stage of life, he gathers the wealth of Maya.
They sit there, in the cave of deep Samaadhi;
Raag Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Dho-Padhay:
Raag Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, Partaal, Third House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
and wandering around at places of pilgrimage, the disease is not taken away.

firstLine: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਮਹੇਸ ਇਕ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਾਰੀ ॥੧੨॥
translationEn: Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva are manifestations of the One God. He Himself is the Doer of deeds. ||12||
Some pass their lives with their mothers, fathers and children.
Raamkalee, Third Mehl, Anand ~ The Song Of Bliss:
Raamkalee, Sadd ~ The Call Of Death:

firstLine: ਇਕ ਓਟ ਕੀਜੈ ਜੀਉ ਦੀਜੈ ਆਸ ਇਕ ਧਰਣੀਧਰੈ ॥
translationEn: Seek the Support of the One Lord, and surrender your soul to Him; place your hopes only in the Sustainer of the World.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, Ruti ~ The Seasons. Salok:

firstLine: ਸਾਧ ਪਠਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਮ ਤੁਮ ਤੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
translationEn: The Lord Himself sent His Holy Saints, to tell us that He is not far away.
Raamkalee, First Mehl, Sidh Gosht ~ Conversations With The Siddhas:

firstLine: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਬੈਸਿ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਚਾਲਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਏ ॥
translationEn: He dwells deep within the nucleus of each and every heart. This is my seat and my home. I walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru.

firstLine: ਜੈਸੇ ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਾਲਮੁ ਮੁਰਗਾਈ ਨੈ ਸਾਣੇ ॥
translationEn: The lotus flower floats untouched upon the surface of the water, and the duck swims through the stream;

firstLine: ਹਾਟੀ ਬਾਟੀ ਰਹਹਿ ਨਿਰਾਲੇ ਰੂਖਿ ਬਿਰਖਿ ਉਦਿਆਨੇ ॥
translationEn: "Away from stores and highways, we live in the woods, among plants and trees.

firstLine: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਭੇਖ ਕਰਹੁ ਜੋਗਿੰਦ੍ਰਾ ਮੁੰਦ੍ਰਾ ਝੋਲੀ ਖਿੰਥਾ ॥
translationEn: "Wear the robes of the sect of Yogis who follow Gorakh; put on the ear-rings, begging wallet and patched coat.
Let your mind turn away in detachment from the world, and let this be your begging bowl. Let the lessons of the five elements be your cap.
He is hidden within each and every heart. The Gurmukh is liberated.
Man is bound by evil-mindedness, and consumed by Maya, the serpent.
"Why have you left your house and become a wandering Udaasee?
How have you subdued your hopes and desires?

firstLine: ਆਦਿ ਕਉ ਕਵਨੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਸੁੰਨ ਕਹਾ ਘਰ ਵਾਸੋ ॥
translationEn: "What can you tell us about the beginning? In what home did the absolute dwell then?

firstLine: ਆਦਿ ਕਉ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਸੁੰਨ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਲੀਆ ॥
translationEn: We can only express a sense of wonder about the beginning. The absolute abided endlessly deep within Himself then.

firstLine: ਸਾਚੌ ਉਪਜੈ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੂਚੇ ਏਕ ਮਇਆ ॥
translationEn: We emerge from Truth, and merge into Truth again. The pure being merges into the One True Lord.
The Gurmukh lives in the Fear of God, the True Lord.
The Gurmukh speaks the unspoken wisdom.
The Gurmukh obtains the eight miraculous spiritual powers, and all wisdom.
Attuned to the Naam, they attain Sidh Gosht - conversation with the Siddhas.
The Gurmukh obtains the jewel, lovingly focused on the Lord.
The Gurmukh understands the Simritees, the Shaastras and the Vedas.

firstLine: ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰੈ ॥
translationEn: One who meets the Guru is carried across.
The comings and goings in reincarnation are ended for the Gurmukh.
"What is the root, the source of all? What teachings hold for these times?

firstLine: ਮੈਣ ਕੇ ਦੰਤ ਕਿਉ ਖਾਈਐ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
translationEn: "With teeth of wax, how can one chew iron?
Imbued with the True Fear of God, pride is taken away;
Giving voice to the Shabad, the moon of the mind is illuminated with infinity.

firstLine: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੁੰਨੰ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸੁੰਨੰ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਸੁੰਨ ਮਸੁੰਨੰ ॥
translationEn: The absolute Lord is deep within; the absolute Lord is outside us as well. The absolute Lord totally fills the three worlds.
By practicing control over the nine gates, one attains perfect control over the Tenth Gate.
"Where is that place, where evil thoughts are destroyed?
One who possesses the merchandise, the wealth of the True Name,

firstLine: ਸੁ ਸਬਦ ਕਉ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਅਲਖੰ ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਸੋਈ ॥
translationEn: That Shabad dwells deep within the nucleus of all beings. God is invisible; wherever I look, there I see Him.

firstLine: ਮਨ ਕਾ ਜੀਉ ਪਵਨੁ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਪਵਨੁ ਕਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਖਾਈ ॥
translationEn: "The air is said to be the soul of the mind. But what does the air feed on?
By Guru's Grace, one is attuned to the Lord's Love.

firstLine: ਵਰਨੁ ਭੇਖੁ ਅਸਰੂਪੁ ਸੁ ਏਕੋ ਏਕੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਿਡਾਣੀ ॥
translationEn: Color, dress and form were contained in the One Lord; the Shabad was contained in the One, Wondrous Lord.

firstLine: ਕਿਤੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਗੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਪੁਰਖਾ ਕਿਤੁ ਕਿਤੁ ਦੁਖਿ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
translationEn: "How, in what way, was the world formed, O man? And what disaster will end it?"

firstLine: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
translationEn: Without serving the True Guru, Yoga is not attained;

firstLine: ਸਬਦੈ ਕਾ ਨਿਬੇੜਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਤੂ ਅਉਧੂ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
translationEn: This is the essence of the Shabad - listen, you hermits and Yogis. Without the Name, there is no Yoga.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਦੇਵਈ ਕਿਆ ਚਲੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
translationEn: My Husband Lord has not blessed me with peace and tranquility; what will work with Him?
Following the Guru's Teachings, one's heart is illumined, and the darkness is dispelled.

firstLine: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਰਾਇ ਬਲਵੰਡਿ ਤਥਾ ਸਤੈ ਡੂਮਿ ਆਖੀ ॥
translationEn: Vaar Of Raamkalee, Uttered By Satta And Balwand The Drummer:

firstLine: ਲਹਣੇ ਦੀ ਫੇਰਾਈਐ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਦੋਹੀ ਖਟੀਐ ॥
translationEn: Nanak proclaimed Lehna's succession - he earned it.

firstLine: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤੀ ਸੋ ਮੰਨਣਾ ਕੋ ਸਾਲੁ ਜਿਵਾਹੇ ਸਾਲੀ ॥
translationEn: He who did the work, is accepted as Guru; so which is better - the thistle or the rice?

firstLine: ਹੋਰਿਂਓ ਗੰਗ ਵਹਾਈਐ ਦੁਨਿਆਈ ਆਖੈ ਕਿ ਕਿਓਨੁ ॥
translationEn: It is as if the Guru made the Ganges flow in the opposite direction, and the world wonders: what has he done?
Then, the True Guru, the son of Pheru, came to dwell at Khadoor.

firstLine: ਸੋ ਟਿਕਾ ਸੋ ਬੈਹਣਾ ਸੋਈ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ॥
translationEn: The same mark on the forehead, the same throne, and the same Royal Court.

firstLine: ਧੰਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਤਿਨੈ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
translationEn: Blessed, blessed is Guru Raam Daas; He who created You, has also exalted You.

firstLine: ਚਾਰੇ ਜਾਗੇ ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗੀ ਪੰਚਾਇਣੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੋਆ ॥
translationEn: The four Gurus enlightened the four ages; the Lord Himself assumed the fifth form.

firstLine: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ॥ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ॥
translationEn: Raamkalee, The Word Of The Devotees. Kabeer Jee:

firstLine: ਗੁੜੁ ਕਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਹੂਆ ਭਉ ਭਾਠੀ ਮਨ ਧਾਰਾ ॥
translationEn: Make spiritual wisdom the molasses, meditation the flowers, and the Fear of God the fire enshrined in your mind.

firstLine: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੋ ਮੇਰੁ ਪਰਬਤੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਓਟ ਗਹੀ ਮੈ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
translationEn: You are my Sumayr Mountain, O my Lord and Master; I have grasped Your Support.

firstLine: ਪੂਰਬ ਜਨਮ ਹਮ ਤੁਮੑਰੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਅਬ ਤਉ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
translationEn: In my past life, I was Your servant; now, I cannot leave You.

firstLine: ਜਿਹ ਮੁਖ ਬੇਦੁ ਗਾਇਤ੍ਰੀ ਨਿਕਸੈ ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਨੁ ਬਿਸਰੁ ਕਰੈ ॥
translationEn: O Brahmin, how can you forget the One, from whose mouth the Vedas and the Gayitri prayer issured forth?

firstLine: ਤਰਵਰੁ ਏਕੁ ਅਨੰਤ ਡਾਰ ਸਾਖਾ ਪੁਹਪ ਪਤ੍ਰ ਰਸ ਭਰੀਆ ॥
translationEn: There is a single tree, with countless branches and twigs; its flowers and leaves are filled with its juice.

firstLine: ਮੁੰਦ੍ਰਾ ਮੋਨਿ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਝੋਲੀ ਪਤ੍ਰ ਕਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਰੇ ॥
translationEn: Make silence your ear-rings, and compassion your wallet; let meditation be your begging bowl.

firstLine: ਕਵਨ ਕਾਜ ਸਿਰਜੇ ਜਗ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਕਵਨ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
translationEn: For what purpose were you created and brought into the world? What rewards have you received in this life?
Remembering Him in meditation, the door of liberation is found.

firstLine: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਬਾਣੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Raamkalee, Second House, The Word Of Kabeer Jee:
The moon and the sun are both the embodiment of light.

firstLine: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਹੁਸੀਆਰ ਬੇਦਾਰ ਜਾਗਤ ਮੁਸੀਅਤ ਹਉ ਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
translationEn: People of the world, remain awake and aware. Even though you are awake, you are being robbed, O Siblings of Destiny.

firstLine: ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
translationEn: The Word Of Naam Dayv Jee, Raamkalee, First House:

firstLine: ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਆਨੰਤਾ ਗੀਤ ਕਬਿਤ ਨ ਗਾਵਉਗੋ ॥
translationEn: There are countless Vedas, Puraanas and Shaastras; I do not sing their songs and hymns.

firstLine: ਮਾਇ ਨ ਹੋਤੀ ਬਾਪੁ ਨ ਹੋਤਾ ਕਰਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਤੀ ਕਾਇਆ ॥
translationEn: When there was no mother and no father, no karma and no human body,
Raamkalee, The Word Of Ravi Daas Jee:
Raamkalee, The Word Of Baynee Jee:
Raag Nat Naaraayan, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Padhay:

firstLine: ਲਗਿ ਲਗਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਈ ਲਗਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
translationEn: Fall in love, fall deeply in love with the Lord; clinging to the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, you will be exalted and embellished.

firstLine: ਆਲ ਜਾਲ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਤਜਿ ਸਭਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨਾ ਨਿਤਿ ਗਾਉ ॥
translationEn: Abandon all your entanglements and corruption; sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord forever.

firstLine: ਮਾਲੀ ਗਉੜਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਨਾਮਦੇਵ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Maalee Gauraa, The Word Of Devotee Naam Dayv Jee:

firstLine: ਮੇਰੋ ਬਾਪੁ ਮਾਧਉ ਤੂ ਧਨੁ ਕੇਸੌ ਸਾਂਵਲੀਓ ਬੀਠੁਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
translationEn: O my Father, Lord of wealth, blessed are You, long-haired, dark-skinned, my darling. ||1||Pause||

firstLine: ਸਭੈ ਘਟ ਰਾਮੁ ਬੋਲੈ ਰਾਮਾ ਬੋਲੈ ॥
translationEn: Within all hearts, the Lord speaks, the Lord speaks.
Raag Maaroo, First Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:
Sin is a stone which does not float.
Raag Maaroo, First Mehl, Fifth House:

firstLine: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਇ ॥
translationEn: My God is independent and self-sufficient; he does not have even an iota of greed.
The Ambrosial Name of the Lord is the ocean of peace.

firstLine: ਬੇਦੁ ਪੁਕਾਰੈ ਮੁਖ ਤੇ ਪੰਡਤ ਕਾਮਾਮਨ ਕਾ ਮਾਠਾ ॥
translationEn: The Pandit, the religious scholar, proclaims the Vedas, but he is slow to act on them.

firstLine: ਅਟਲ ਅਖਇਓ ਦੇਵਾ ਮੋਹਨ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
translationEn: You are eternal and unchanging, imperishable, invisible and infinite, O divine fascinating Lord.
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House, Dho-Padhay:
Maaroo, Anjulee ~ With Hands Cupped In Prayer, Fifth Mehl, Seventh House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਹਰਿ ਪੜੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਉਧਾਰਾ ॥
translationEn: Study the Lord's Name, and understand the Lord's Name; follow the Guru's Teachings, and through the Naam, you shall be saved.

firstLine: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ਹੈ ਕਾਟੈ ਮਨ ਪੀਰਾ ॥੨॥
translationEn: The Perfect Guru is honored and celebrated; He has taken away the pains of my mind. ||2||

firstLine: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੈ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਪੂਅਰ ਤਾਪੈ ॥
translationEn: Without the Guru, the fire within is not quenched; and outside, the fire still burns.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

firstLine: ਕਲਰ ਖੇਤੀ ਤਰਵਰ ਕੰਠੇ ਬਾਗਾ ਪਹਿਰਹਿ ਕਜਲੁ ਝਰੈ ॥
translationEn: He is like the crop planted in the salty soil, or the tree growing on the river bank, or the white clothes sprinkled with dirt.
Maaroo, Third Mehl, Fifth House, Ashtpadheeyaa:
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Third House, Ashtpadheeyaa:
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Ashtpadheeyaa:
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl, Eighth House, Anjulees ~ With Hands Cupped In Prayer:

firstLine: ਦੋਜਕਿ ਪਾਏ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੈ ਬਾਣੀਆ ॥੨॥
translationEn: They are consigned to hell by the Creator Lord, and the Accountant calls them to give their account. ||2||
Abandon slander and envy of others.
The True Guru, the Giver, grants liberation;
God grants His Grace, and carries him across to the other side.
I am the slave of Your slaves, O my Beloved.
There were no castes or social classes, no religious robes, no Brahmin or Kh'shaatriya.
The Primal Lord is everywhere, immaculate and all-knowing.
The sublime essence of the Beloved Naam is utterly sweet.
Uniting with Himself, He bestows glorious greatness.

firstLine: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਵਸਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
translationEn: He dwells in each and every heart, the Great Giver, the Life of the world.
The Perfect True Guru has imparted this understanding.

firstLine: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
translationEn: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he chants the Name of the Lord.

firstLine: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
translationEn: One who remains forever imbued with His Love, night and day - in His Mercy, the Lord inspires him to perform devotional worship service. ||6||
The True Lord Himself unites us in the Word of His Shabad.
The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is in all places and interspaces.

firstLine: ਇਕਿ ਭੂਖੇ ਇਕਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਏ ਸਭਸੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਪਾਰਣਾ ॥੩॥
translationEn: Some are hungry and some are satisfied and satiated, but all lean on Your Support. ||3||
God is the Creator of the body-vessel.

firstLine: ਮਿਰਤ ਲੋਕ ਪਇਆਲ ਸਮੀਪਤ ਅਸਥਿਰ ਥਾਨੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਹੈ ਅਭਗਾ ॥੧੨॥
translationEn: He is near this world and the nether regions of the underworld; His Place is permanent, ever-stable and imperishable. ||12||
God exists in the beginning, in the middle and in the end.

firstLine: ਆਪੇ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਵਰਤੀਜੈ ॥
translationEn: He Himself created the entire universe, and He Himself is pervading it.

firstLine: ਤੁਧੁ ਥਾਪੇ ਚਾਰੇ ਜੁਗ ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਗਲ ਧਰਣ ॥
translationEn: You established the four ages; You are the Creator of all worlds.

firstLine: ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਈਅਨਿ ਤਿਤੈ ਲਗਦੀਆ ਨਹ ਖਿੰਜੋਤਾੜਾ ॥
translationEn: Wherever I join them, there they are joined; they do not struggle against me.

firstLine: ਰਾਗੁ ਮਾਰੂ ਬਾਣੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
translationEn: Raag Maaroo, The Word Of Kabeer Jee:

firstLine: ਬਨਹਿ ਬਸੇ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਉ ਲਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਤਜਹਿ ਬਿਕਾਰ ॥
translationEn: Living in the forest, how will you find Him? Not until you remove corruption from your mind.

firstLine: ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਫੁਰੀ ਤਬ ਕਾਹੂ ਸਿਉ ਕਿਆ ਕਾਜ ॥
translationEn: You have riches and miraculous spiritual powers; so what business do you have with anyone else?

firstLine: ਉਦਕ ਸਮੁੰਦ ਸਲਲ ਕੀ ਸਾਖਿਆ ਨਦੀ ਤਰੰਗ ਸਮਾਵਹਿਗੇ ॥
translationEn: Like drops of water in the water of the ocean, and like waves in the stream, I merge in the Lord.

firstLine: ਜਉ ਤੁਮੑ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਤ ਹਉ ਤਉ ਤੁਮ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਬਤਾਵਹੁ ॥
translationEn: If You keep me far away from You, then tell me, what is liberation?

firstLine: ਜਿਨਿ ਗੜ ਕੋਟ ਕੀਏ ਕੰਚਨ ਕੇ ਛੋਡਿ ਗਇਆ ਸੋ ਰਾਵਨੁ ॥੧॥
translationEn: Raawan made castles and fortresses of gold, but he had to abandon them when he left. ||1||

firstLine: ਦੇਹੀ ਗਾਵਾ ਜੀਉ ਧਰ ਮਹਤਉ ਬਸਹਿ ਪੰਚ ਕਿਰਸਾਨਾ ॥
translationEn: The body is a village, and the soul is the owner and farmer; the five farm-hands live there.
